title: Use Disclosure Only When the Task Fits
summary: Build and verify semantic disclosure in cooling-center question panel through prediction, parsed-structure inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain semantic disclosure from purpose and parsed structure.
Apply semantic disclosure while retaining prior HTML requirements.
Diagnose the named misconception in a changed content and interaction scenario.

content.text: Details and summary provide a native disclosure with keyboard and pointer behavior. They fit optional supporting information that can be independently expanded. They are not a replacement for navigation menus, modal dialogs, select inputs, or custom widgets with different state and focus requirements. Apply it to cooling-center question panel.
